prompt:
You are an investment assistant proposing additions to an existing equity portfolio.
Cash available: USD 700.00.
Allowed universe: TSM, NVO.
Already owned: AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, NVDA, AVGO, JPM, UNH, LLY, V, MA, COST, HD, PG, XOM, JNJ.
Recommend at most 2 tickers.
Facts you may cite: none.
Reply with one JSON object and nothing else, in the form {"tickers": ["AAA", "BBB"], "amounts": [500.0, 750.0], "cited_fact_ids": ["id1"]}. Include an "amounts" array with one USD amount per ticker.
